name: apply
description: Executes impact report: creates/closes/updates beads via bead CLI (br or bd), tags with proposal, saves new merkle snapshot.

requirements.title: Create beads
requirements.description: Create beads via bead CLI (br or bd) with full spec metadata: module, component, impl_section, spec_hash, proposal reference.

requirements.title: Close beads
requirements.description: Close obsolete beads via bead CLI (br or bd) with a reason explaining the spec change.

requirements.title: Update bead metadata
requirements.description: Update spec_hash and other metadata on beads whose spec nodes were modified.

requirements.title: Tag with proposal
requirements.description: All affected beads (created, closed, reviewed) are tagged with the proposal reference that triggered the change.

requirements.title: Save snapshot
requirements.description: After applying all bead actions, save the new merkle snapshot to mark the current state as baseline.

requirements.title: Idempotent apply
requirements.description: Applying the same impact report twice produces no additional changes. Already-created beads are not duplicated, already-closed beads are not re-closed.

components.name: BeadCreator
components.description: Creates new beads via the bead CLI (br or bd) with spec metadata attached.

components.name: BeadCloser
components.description: Closes obsolete beads via the bead CLI (br or bd) with a reason derived from the impact report.

components.name: BeadUpdater
components.description: Updates bead metadata to reflect modified spec nodes.

components.name: ProposalTagger
components.description: Tags all affected beads with the proposal reference that triggered the changes.

components.name: SnapshotSaver
components.description: Saves the new merkle snapshot after all bead actions are complete.

components.name: ApplyCommand
components.description: CLI entry point for spex apply. Reads impact report, wires BeadCreator, BeadCloser, BeadUpdater, ProposalTagger, SnapshotSaver, executes all bead actions.

data_flows.name: Apply flow
data_flows.description: Impact report is read, bead actions are executed in order (creates, then updates, then closes), all are tagged with the proposal, and the new snapshot is saved.
